scripts.schema:all: pnpm run schema:directories && pnpm run schema:json && pnpm run schema:swift && pnpm run schema:kotlin
scripts.schema:swift: pnpm run schema:swift:clean && quicktype --src ./build/schema/json/types.json#/definitions/ --src-lang schema --access-level public --protocol hashable --sendable --density dense --multi-file-output --out ./build/schema/swift/Types.swift

devDependencies comments (non-standard-k.vite-plugin-dts: Currently 4.2.4 as 4.3.0 creates relative import statements in the output instead of including the types. This breaks the build. also see: https://github.com/qmhc/vite-plugin-dts/issues/404
